Your Oura Membership provides a comprehensive view of your health for just $5.99 USD/month. New members, get your first month on us.*

Oura App

Millions of Oura Members

Your Oura Membership and your Oura Ring go hand in hand to help you achieve your health goals. Track over 50 health metrics and get personalized insights into your sleep, activity, stress, and more.

  • Dynamic, in-the-moment insights

    Beyond your daily Scores (Sleep, Readiness, and Activity), you’ll receive helpful information about your health to help guide you toward holistic wellbeing.

  • A clear picture of your health

    Check the vitals that matter most with 24/7 health sensing, including your resting heart rate, steps and calories, daytime stress levels, and much more.

  • Unlock long-term wellbeing

    Understand your unique strengths and opportunities when it comes to your longer-term health and longevity, including your cardiovascular age and resilience to stress.

As you evolve, so does your Oura Membership

Item 1 of 4

Oura Membership translates your body's data into actionable insights personalized to your unique needs. When you become an Oura Member, you gain access to Oura Advisor (Oura’s AI-powered health companion) and all new features and enhancements as they’re added to the Oura App.

Your health data, protected

Learn More

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, purchasing, activating, and consistently wearing an Oura Ring is the only way to unlock access to all of the daily health insights that come with the Oura Membership.

Upgrading is easy. Just add your Oura Ring as a new device in the Oura App — no new Membership needed. You can also connect more than one ring and switch between them.

You can cancel your Oura Membership whenever you choose by logging into the Membership Hub. Please note, you will still have access to the full membership experience until the end of the current billing cycle.

If you cancel but do not delete your account, your personal data will continue to be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

If you choose not to begin or continue your Oura Membership, your Oura Ring and Oura App will still function, but the insights, personal health data, and benefits you receive will be much more limited.

Your Oura Membership starts as soon as you activate your Oura Ring. Remember, the first month is on us (for new members).*
